title: fagraea auriculata subsp. borneensis
intro: Fagraea auriculata subsp. borneensis, also known as the Borneo fagraea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, native to Borneo. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Fagraea auriculata subsp. borneensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in folk medicine.
